 117  		Q48M = create_named_weapon(Q4EC, 0x1DA0, "head", name);
 118  		copyObjVar(Q48M, usedon, "controller");
 119  		deleteObject(usedon);
 120  		Q48M = create_named_weapon(Q4EC, 0x1DA1, "left arm", name);
 121  		Q48M = create_named_weapon(Q4EC, 0x1DA2, "right arm", name);
 122  		Q48M = create_named_weapon(Q4EC, 0x1DA3, "left leg", name);
 123  		Q48M = create_named_weapon(Q4EC, 0x1DA4, "right leg", name);
 124  		Q48M = create_named_weapon(Q4EC, 0x1D9F, "torso", name);

 127  		deleteObject(usedon);
 128  		Q495 = spawn_bladed_weapon(Q4EC);
 129  		Q48M = create_named_weapon(Q4EC, 0x1CF0, "brain", name);
 130  		Q48M = create_named_weapon(Q4EC, 0x1AE2, "skull", name);

 132  	case 0x1D9F

 135  		Q48M = create_named_weapon(Q4EC, 0x1B17, "ribcage", name);
 136  		Q48M = create_named_weapon(Q4EC, 0x1CEE, "liver", name);
 137  		Q48M = create_named_weapon(Q4EC, 0x1CED, "heart", name);
 138  		Q48M = create_named_weapon(Q4EC, 0x1CEC, "entrails", name);

 140  	case 0x1DA4
 141  	case 0x1DA3

 143  		Q495 = spawn_bladed_weapon(Q4EC);
 144  		Q48M = create_named_weapon(Q4EC, 0x1B11, "femur", name);
 145  		break;

 149  		Q495 = spawn_bladed_weapon(Q4EC);
 150  		Q48M = create_named_weapon(Q4EC, 0x1B12, "armbone", name);
 151  		break;
 152  	}
 153  	return();
 154  }

  74  function int Q4BG(obj killer, obj victim) {
  75  	int Q51M = get_kill_count(killer);
  76  	int Q67R = get_kill_count(victim);
  77  	if (!isPlayer(killer)) {
  78  		return(0x00);
  79  	}
  80  	if (!isPlayer(victim)) {
  81  		return(0x00);
  82  	}
  83  	if (Q51M < Q67R) {
  84  		if (0x00) {
  85  			bark(victim, "Killer's killcount lower than victim's");
  86  		}
  87  		systemMessage(victim, "You cannot report this death because the person who killed you has slain less people than you have.");
  88  		return(0x00);
  89  	}
  90  	if (getNotorietyLevel(victim) < (0x00 - 0x01)) {
  91  		if (0x00) {
  92  			bark(victim, "Victim's notoriety too low to report.");
  93  		}
  94  		systemMessage(victim, "You cannot report this death to Lord British's guards because your notoriety is too low.");
  95  		return(0x00);
  96  	}
  97  	if (isCriminal(victim)) {
  98  		if (0x00) {
  99  			bark(victim, "Victim flagged criminal");
 100  		}
 101  		systemMessage(victim, "You cannot report this death to Lord British's guards because you are flagged as a criminal because of your recent deeds.");
 102  		return(0x00);
 103  	}
 104  	if (!hasObjVar(victim, "lastCriminal")) {
 105  		if (0x00) {
 106  			bark(victim, "Victim doesn't have lastCriminal attached");
 107  		}
 108  		return(0x00);

 112  		if (0x00) {
 113  			bark(victim, "Victim's last criminal doesn't match killer");
 114  		}
 115  		return(0x00);
 116  	}
 117  	return(0x01);
 118  }

 153  	int y = getY(place);
 154  	loc Q5DL = place;

 156  	int Q62L = getTile(place);
 157  	setX(Q5DL, x - 0x01);
 158  	left = getTile(Q5DL);
 159  	setY(Q5DL, y - 0x01);
 160  	Q66J = getTile(Q5DL);
 161  	setX(Q5DL, x);
 162  	Q66I = getTile(Q5DL);

 164  	Q66K = getTile(Q5DL);

 169  	setX(Q5DL, x);
 170  	lower = getTile(Q5DL);
 171  	setX(Q5DL, x - 0x01);
 172  	Q546 = getTile(Q5DL);
 173  	if (is_mountain_tile(Q4AU)) {

 175  	}
 176  	if ((is_mountain_tile(Q66J)) && (!is_mountain_tile(left)) && (!is_mountain_tile(Q66I))) {
 177  		Q62L = 0x07;
 178  		c = 0x01;
 179  	}
 180  	if ((is_mountain_tile(Q66K)) && (!is_mountain_tile(right)) && (!is_mountain_tile(Q66I))) {
 181  		Q62L = 0x08;
 182  		c = 0x01;
 183  	}
 184  	if ((is_mountain_tile(Q547)) && (!is_mountain_tile(right)) && (!is_mountain_tile(lower))) {

 191  	}

 384  function void Q4M6(loc place) {
 385  	int Q63M;
 386  	int Q52M;
 387  	int Q5NS;
 388  	int Q48W;
 389  	list t;
 390  	t = 0x022C, 0x022D, 0x022E, 0x022F;
 391  	Q63M = getElevation(place);
 392  	loc Q52P = getX(place), getY(place) + 0x01, 0x00;
 393  	Q52M = getElevation(Q52P);
 394  	loc Q5NU = getX(place) + 0x01, getY(place), 0x00;
 395  	Q5NS = getElevation(Q5NU);
 396  	loc Q48X = getX(place) + 0x01, getY(place) + 0x01, 0x00;
 397  	Q48W = getElevation(Q48X);
 398  	if (is_terrain_flat_at_location(place)) {
 399  		t = 0x0230;
 400  		setTile(place, t[random(0x00, numInList(t) - 0x01)]);
 401  		return();
 402  	}
 403  	if ((Q63M > Q52M) && (Q48W == Q52M) && (Q63M > Q5NS)) {
 404  		t = 0x0229;
 405  		setTile(place, t[random(0x00, numInList(t) - 0x01)]);
 406  		return();
 407  	}
 408  	if ((Q52M > Q63M) && (Q52M > Q48W) && (Q5NS > Q63M) && (Q5NS > Q48W)) {
 409  		t = 0x0227;
 410  		setTile(place, t[random(0x00, numInList(t) - 0x01)]);
 411  		return();
 412  	}
 413  	if (Q52M > Q5NS) {
 414  		t = 0x022B, 0x021F, 0x0220, 0x0221, 0x0222, 0x0223, 0x0224, 0x0225, 0x0226;
 415  		setTile(place, t[random(0x00, numInList(t) - 0x01)]);
 416  		return();
 417  	}
 418  	if (getTile(place) != 0x022B) {
 419  		if (getTile(Q5NU) == 0x022B) {
 420  			t = 0x0220;
 421  			setTile(place, t[random(0x00, numInList(t) - 0x01)]);
 422  			return();
 423  		}
 424  	}
 425  	setTile(place, t[random(0x00, numInList(t) - 0x01)]);
 426  	return();
 427  }

 469  	if ((is_water_tile(Q66K)) && (!is_water_tile(right)) && (!is_water_tile(Q66I))) {

 476  		c = 0x01;
 477  	}
 478  	if ((is_water_tile(Q546)) && (!is_water_tile(left)) && (!is_water_tile(lower))) {

 480  		c = 0x01;
 481  	}
 482  	if ((is_water_tile(left)) && (!is_water_tile(right))) {

 495  	}

 498  		c = 0x01;
 499  	}
 500  	if ((is_water_tile(left)) && (is_water_tile(Q66I))) {

 502  		c = 0x01;
 503  	}
 504  	if ((is_water_tile(left)) && (is_water_tile(lower))) {

 517  	}

 144  function string Q4S3() {
 145  	string name;
 146  	if (Q454) {
 147  		concat(name, "an active ");
 148  	} else {
 149  		concat(name, "an inactive ");
 150  	}
 151  	concat(name, "crystal of communication");

 153  	int Q4AX = get_current_charges();
 154  	if (Q4AX < 0x00) {
 155  		concat(name, "infinite");
 156  	} else {

 158  	}
 159  	concat(name, " charges");
 160  	int Q5EU = get_link_count();
 161  	if (Q5EU > 0x00) {
 162  		concat(name, " and ");
 163  		name = name + Q5EU;
 164  		concat(name, " links");
 165  	}
 166  	return(name);
 167  }

#18 cook.m Q4E8 → cook_item
Source void 
  76  function void Q4E8(obj user, obj Q66M, int Q4QY, string name) {
  77  	if (isAtHome(this)) {
  78  		systemMessage(user, "You can't use that, it belongs to someone else.");
  79  		return();
  80  	}
  81  	int Q66P = getObjType(Q66M);
  82  	if (is_cooking_ingredient(Q66P)) {
  83  		if (!testSkill(user, 0x0D)) {
  84  			systemMessage(user, "You burn the food to a crisp! It's ruined.");
  85  			destroyOne(this);
  86  			return();
  87  		}
  88  		if (name != "default") {
  89  			if (hasObjVar(this, "NAME")) {
  90  				removeObjVar(this, "NAME");
  91  				setObjVar(this, "NAME", name);
  92  			}
  93  		}
  94  		if (random(0x00, 0x01)) {
  95  			barkTo(user, user, "Looks delicious.");
  96  		} else {
  97  			barkTo(user, user, "Mmmm, smells good.");
  98  		}
  99  		obj Q47F = getBackpack(user);
 100  		int Q4TM;
 101  		obj Q5CN = createGlobalObjectOn(this, Q4QY);
 102  		if (!isInContainer(this)) {
 103  			if (canHold(Q47F, Q5CN)) {
 104  				Q4TM = putObjContainer(Q5CN, Q47F);
 105  				systemMessage(user, "You put the cooked food into your backpack.");
 106  			} else {
 107  				Q4TM = teleport(Q5CN, getLocation(user));
 108  				systemMessage(user, "You put the cooked food on the ground.");
 109  			}
 110  		}
 111  		destroyOne(this);
 112  	} else {
 113  		systemMessage(user, "You can't cook on that.");
 114  	}
 115  	return();
 116  }

  41  		break;
  42  	}
  43  	return();

  19  	if (charges <= 0x00) {
  20  		return(0x01);
  21  	}

  29  			Q4JZ(Q68V, victim, 0x00);
  30  		}
  31  		charges = charges - 0x01;
  32  		setObjVar(this, "charges", charges);
  33  		returnResourcesToBank(this, 0x09, "magic");

  35  		systemMessage(Q68V, "This magic item is out of charges.");

#29 globals.m Q41R → can_resurrect_target
Source int 
  49  function int Q41R(obj user, obj usedon) {
  50  	if (usedon == NULL()) {
  51  		return(0x00);
  52  	}
  53  	if (user == usedon) {
  54  		systemMessage(user, "Thou can not resurrect thyself.");
  55  		return(0x00);
  56  	}
  57  	if (isDead(user)) {
  58  		systemMessage(user, "The resurrecter must be alive.");
  59  		return(0x00);
  60  	}
  61  	if (canSeeObj(user, usedon) == 0x01) {
  62  		if (isPlayer(usedon)) {
  63  			if (!isDead(usedon)) {
  64  				systemMessage(user, "Target is not dead.");
  65  				return(0x00);
  66  			}
  67  			loc target = getLocation(usedon);
  68  			int Q4XW = getHeight(usedon);
  69  			if (0x07 != canExistAt(target, Q4XW, 0x01)) {
  70  				systemMessage(user, "Target can not be resurrected at that location.");
  71  				return(0x00);
  72  			}
  73  			loc Q671 = getLocation(user);
  74  			if ((getDistanceInTiles(Q671, target) > 0x01) || (!are_objects_in_same_multi(user, usedon))) {
  75  				systemMessage(user, "Target is not close enough.");
  76  				return(0x00);
  77  			}
  78  			return(0x01);
  79  		} else {
  80  			systemMessage(user, "Target is not a being.");
  81  			return(0x00);
  82  		}
  83  	} else {
  84  		systemMessage(user, "Target cannot be seen.");
  85  		return(0x00);
  86  	}
  87  	return(0x00);
  88  }

  43  		return(0x00);

  45  	getObjListVar(boss_list, pet, "myBoss");

 125  function void open_gameplay_issues_menu(obj Q4XN) {
 126  	list report_menu_options;
 127  	appendToList(report_menu_options, 0x00);

 293  	appendToList(report_menu_options, 0x01);
 294  	appendToList(report_menu_options, "If your character is losing skill or attribute points quickly, say 10 points an hour, you may have a corrupted character.  Select this option to call a Game Master.");
 295  	selectType(crystal_obj, crystal_obj, 0x70, "Ultima Online does have things which lower skills as well as raise them.  297  }

  51  function loc Q4X1(int Q65M, loc place) {
  52  	loc Q63N;
  53  	loc Q48Y;
  54  	int Q4XN = calculate_door_gump_id(Q65M, 0x00);
  55  	if (getMultiExtents(Q4XN, Q63N, Q48Y)) {
  56  		setY(place, getY(place) - getY(Q48Y));
  57  	}
  58  	return(place);
  59  }

 236  function void Q4M5(obj this) {
 237  	list Q5XE;
 238  	getObjectsInRange(Q5XE, getLocation(this), 0x04);
 239  	int Q60R = random(0x00, numInList(Q5XE) - 0x01);
 240  	obj Q61K = Q5XE[Q60R];
 241  	if (!check_static_objects_at_location(this, Q61K)) {
 242  		return();
 243  	}
 244  	if (getWeight(Q61K) > 0x14) {
 245  		if (0x00) {
 246  			bark(this, "Tried to scavenge something too heavy. :P");
 247  		}
 248  		return();
 249  	}
 250  	if (!isMoveable(Q61K, this)) {
 251  		return();
 252  	}
 253  	if (is_object_in_guard_list(this, Q61K)) {
 254  		return();
 255  	}
 256  	if (getObjType(Q61K) < 0x03) {
 257  		return();
 258  	}
 259  	if (hasObjVar(this, "ScavengeLastItemGotten")) {
 260  		obj Q63H = getObjVar(this, "ScavengeLastItemGotten");
 261  		if (hasObj(this, Q63H)) {
 262  			deleteObject(Q63H);
 263  		}
 264  	}
 265  
 266  member obj Q5OI = Q61K;
 267  	walkTo(this, getLocation(Q61K), 0x08);
 268  	return();
 269  }

1262  function int Q5VF(obj this, obj speaker, string arg) {
1263  	list args;
1264  	split(args, arg);
1265  	int Q4QI = 0x00;
1266  	int Q4Q1;
1267  	string bar;
1268  	list Q4BC;
1269  	list Q5Z4;
1270  	string Q4QS;
1271  	if (getResourcesOnObj(this, 0x00, Q5Z4)) {
1272  		copyList(Q4BC, Q5Z4);
1273  	}
1274  	if (getResourcesOnObj(this, 0x02, Q5Z4)) {
1275  		for (int i = 0x00; i < (numInList(Q5Z4) - 0x01); i++) {
1276  			bar = Q5Z4[i];
1277  			appendToList(Q4BC, bar);
1278  		}
1279  	}
1280  	string Q47Y;
1281  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q4BC); i++) {
1282  		for (int Q518 = 0x00; Q518 < numInList(args); Q518++) {
1283  			bar = Q4BC[i];
1284  			Q47Y = args[Q518];
1285  			if (bar == Q47Y) {
1286  				Q4QI = 0x01;
1287  				Q4QS = Q4BC[i];
1288  			}
1289  		}
1290  	}
1291  	if (Q4QI) {
1292  		if (0x00) {
1293  			bark(this, "Found something!");
1294  			bark(this, Q4QS);
1295  		}
1296  		bar = Q4QS;
1297  		if (getResource(Q4Q1, this, Q4QS, 0x00, 0x02)) {
1298  			bar = getResourceName(Q4QS, 0x00);
1299  		} else {
1300  			if (getResource(Q4Q1, this, Q4QS, 0x02, 0x02)) {
1301  				bar = getResourceName(Q4QS, 0x02);
1302  			}
1303  		}
1304  		setObjVar(this, "CurrentNeedString", bar);
1305  		replyTo(this, speaker, "@InternalNeedResponse");
1306  		start_conversation_pause(this);
1307  		return(0x00);
1308  	}
1309  	return(0x01);
1310  }

#55 human.m Q4C4 → handle_time_speech
Source int 
1312  function int Q4C4(obj this, obj speaker, string arg) {
1313  	list args;
1314  	split(args, arg);
1315  	if (isInList(args, "time")) {
1316  		string Q613;
1317  		int Q60B;
1318  		string Q4WP;
1319  		int Q60I;
1320  		string Q57B;
1321  		int Q45A = 0x00;
1322  		Q60I = getMinute();
1323  		Q60B = getHour();
1324  		Q60I = Q60I / 0x05;
1325  		switch(Q60I) {
1326  		case 0x00
1327  			Q57B = "";
1328  			Q45A = 0x01;
1329  			break;
1330  		case 0x01
1331  			Q57B = "a few minutes past";
1332  			break;
1333  		case 0x02
1334  			Q57B = "ten past";
1335  			break;
1336  		case 0x03
1337  			Q57B = "quarter past";
1338  			break;
1339  		case 0x04
1340  			Q57B = "twenty minutes past";
1341  			break;
1342  		case 0x05
1343  			Q57B = "a few minutes shy of half-past";
1344  			break;
1345  		case 0x06
1346  			Q57B = "half-past";
1347  			break;
1348  		case 0x07
1349  			Q57B = "just over half-past";
1350  			break;
1351  		case 0x08
1352  			Q57B = "lacking twenty minutes until";
1353  			Q60B = Q60B + 0x01;
1354  			break;
1355  		case 0x09
1356  			Q57B = "quarter of";
1357  			Q60B = Q60B + 0x01;
1358  			break;
1359  		case 0x0A

1361  			Q60B = Q60B + 0x01;

2021  function int Q4M7(obj this, obj speaker, string arg) {
2022  	if (!isShopkeeper(this)) {
2023  		return(0x01);
2024  	}
2025  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(this);
2026  	loc there = getLocation(speaker);
2027  	if (getDistanceInTiles(Q4VS, there) > 0x03) {
2028  		return(0x01);
2029  	}

2044  	}

2046  		if (0x01) {
2047  			Q4QP = 0x01;
2048  		}
2049  	}

2051  		return(0x01);
2052  	}
2053  	if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
2054  		if (getNotoriety(speaker) < (0x00 - 0x5A)) {
2055  			bark(this, "I shall not treat with scum like thee!");
2056  			return(0x00);
2057  		}
2058  	} else {
2059  		if (isMurderer(speaker)) {
2060  			bark(this, "I shall not treat with scum like thee!");
2061  			return(0x00);
2062  		}
2063  		if (getKarmaLevel(speaker) < (0x00 - 0x04)) {
2064  			bark(this, "I shall not treat with scum like thee!");
2065  			return(0x00);
2066  		}
2067  	}
2068  	Q4QI = 0x00;
2069  	if (hasObjVar(this, "myJobLocation")) {
2070  		loc myJobLocation = getObjVar(this, "myJobLocation");

2072  			string myHomeShop = getObjVar(this, "myHomeShop");

2075  			split(Q5GR, myHomeShop);
2076  			myHomeShop = Q5GR[0x00];

2078  				bark(this, myHomeShop);
2079  			}
2080  			string Q4GC = "";
2081  			list Q4FM;

2083  				scoreToSpace(Q4GC);

2085  				Q4GC = Q4FM[0x00];
2086  				if (0x00) {

2096  		}

2102  			}
2103  			return(0x00);
2104  		}
2105  	} else {
2106  		bark(this, "Alas, I have no shop! I cannot do business with thee.");
2107  		start_conversation_pause(this);
2108  		return(0x00);
2109  	}
2110  	int guildMember = 0xFF;
2111  	int Q5SW = 0xFE;
2112  	if (hasObjVar(this, "guildMember")) {
2113  		Q5SW = getObjVar(this, "guildMember");
2114  	}

2116  		guildMember = getObjVar(speaker, "guildMember");
2117  	}
2118  	if (Q5SW == guildMember) {
2119  		bark(this, "As thou'rt of my same guild, I shall discount my wares to thee.");
2120  		start_conversation_pause(this);
2121  	}

2158  function int Q4CE(string Q46R) {
2159  	int i;
2160  	list Q59E;
2161  	int Q4QM = 0x00;
2162  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "myMurderWitnessList")) {
2163  		debugMessage("No murder list.");
2164  		return(0x00);
2165  	}
2166  	getObjListVar(Q59E, this, "myMurderWitnessList");
2167  	list Q61X;
2168  	string Q5ZM;
2169  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q59E); i++) {
2170  		copyList(Q61X, Q59E[i]);
2171  		if (Q46R == getName(Q61X[0x00])) {
2172  			Q5ZM = getName(Q61X[0x00]) + " is a bloody murderer! I saw " + getHimHer(Q61X[0x00]) + " kill " + getName(Q61X[0x01]) + " with my own eyes!";
2173  			Q4QM = 0x01;
2174  			break;
2175  		}
2176  		if (Q46R == getName(Q61X[0x01])) {
2177  			Q5ZM = getName(Q61X[0x01]) + " was brutally slain by " + getName(Q61X[0x00]) + "!" + " I saw it with my own eyes!";
2178  			Q4QM = 0x01;
2179  			break;
2180  		}
2181  	}
2182  	if (Q4QM) {
2183  		start_conversation_pause(this);
2184  		obj Q611 = Q61X[0x00];
2185  		string Q58D = getHeShe(Q611) + " is " + getDirection(getLocation(this), getLocation(Q611)) + ".";
2186  		bark(this, Q58D);
2187  		if (getDirection(getLocation(this), getLocation(Q611)) != "right here") {
2188  			Q58D = "It is " + getDistance(getLocation(this), getLocation(Q611)) + " from here.";
2189  			if (getDistance(getLocation(this), getLocation(Q611)) == "right here") {
2190  				Q58D = "Just turn around and look.";
2191  			}
2192  			bark(this, Q58D);
2193  			return(0x01);
2194  		}
2195  	}
2196  	return(0x00);
2197  }

  84  function void Q4M1(obj this, obj target, int mod) {
  85  	if (!can_see_player_target(this, target)) {
  86  		return();
  87  	}
  88  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(this);
  89  	loc Q60S = getLocation(target);
  90  	int Q603 = getDistanceInTiles(Q4VS, Q60S);
  91  	list memoryNotoriety;
  92  	list memoryRecent;
  93  	if (hasObjVar(this, "memoryNotoriety")) {
  94  		getObjListVar(memoryNotoriety, this, "memoryNotoriety");
  95  	}
  96  	if (hasObjVar(this, "memoryRecent")) {
  97  		getObjListVar(memoryRecent, this, "memoryRecent");
  98  	}
  99  	int Q4OW;
 100  	if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
 101  		Q4OW = getNotoriety(target) + mod;
 102  	} else {
 103  		Q4OW = getFame(target) + mod;
 104  	}
 105  	if (Q4OW < 0x00) {
 106  		Q4OW = 0x00 - Q4OW;
 107  	}
 108  	list Q61Q;
 109  	list Q63D;
 110  	int Q45N;
 111  	int Q61D;
 112  	obj Q5ZK;
 113  	list Q5H1;
 114  	setItem(Q5H1, target, 0x00);
 115  	setItem(Q5H1, Q4OW, 0x01);
 116  	setItem(Q5H1, 0x00, 0x02);
 117  	obj Q5H0;
 118  	int Q55T = numInList(memoryNotoriety);
 119  	if (0x00) {
 120  		debugMessage("Updating memory of famous folks.");
 121  	}
 122  	for (int i = 0x00; i < Q55T; i++) {
 123  		copyList(Q61Q, memoryNotoriety[i]);
 124  		Q5ZK = Q61Q[0x00];
 125  		Q5H0 = Q5H1[0x00];
 126  		if (Q5ZK == Q5H0) {
 127  			removeItem(memoryNotoriety, i);
 128  			Q55T--;
 129  			if (0x00) {
 130  				debugMessage("Found this guy in notoriety memory, erasing.");
 131  			}
 132  			break;
 133  		}
 134  	}
 135  	for (i = 0x00; i < Q55T; i++) {
 136  		copyList(Q61Q, memoryNotoriety[i]);
 137  		Q45N = Q61Q[0x02];
 138  		Q61D = Q61Q[0x01];
 139  		Q5ZK = Q61Q[0x00];
 140  		Q45N++;
 141  		setItem(Q61Q, Q45N, 0x02);
 142  		setItem(memoryNotoriety, Q61Q, i);
 143  		if ((Q61D - Q45N) <= Q4OW) {
 144  			appendToList(Q63D, i);
 145  			if (0x00) {
 146  				debugMessage("Found someone to forget.");
 147  			}
 148  		}
 149  	}
 150  	if (numInList(Q63D) != 0x00) {
 151  		int Q548 = 0x00;
 152  		int Q549 = 0x0F;
 153  		int Q61T;
 154  		for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q63D); i++) {
 155  			Q61T = Q63D[i];
 156  			copyList(Q61Q, memoryNotoriety[Q61T]);
 157  			Q45N = Q61Q[0x02];
 158  			Q61D = Q61Q[0x01];
 159  			if (Q61D < Q549) {
 160  				Q548 = i;
 161  				Q549 = Q61D;
 162  			}
 163  		}
 164  		int Q60R = Q63D[Q548];
 165  		removeItem(memoryNotoriety, Q60R);
 166  		if (0x00) {
 167  			debugMessage("Removing a forgettable person.");
 168  		}
 169  		appendToList(memoryNotoriety, Q5H1);
 170  	} else {
 171  		if (numInList(memoryNotoriety) < 0x0A) {
 172  			appendToList(memoryNotoriety, Q5H1);
 173  		}
 174  	}
 175  	setObjVar(this, "memoryNotoriety", memoryNotoriety);
 176  	return();
 177  }

 256  function int Q4J8(obj this, obj speaker, string arg) {
 257  	loc Q4VS = getLocation(this);
 258  	loc there = getLocation(speaker);
 259  	int Q602 = getDirectionInternal(Q4VS, there);
 260  
 261  member int Q5M8 = Q602;
 262  	list args;
 263  	split(args, arg);
 264  	int Q4QI = 0x00;
 265  	int Q4KB = 0x01;
 266  	if (isDead(speaker)) {
 267  		return(0x00);
 268  	}
 269  	if (!canSeeObj(this, speaker)) {
 270  		return(0x00);
 271  	}
 272  	if (getDistanceInTiles(getLocation(this), getLocation(speaker)) > 0x05) {
 273  		return(0x00);
 274  	}
 275  	obj lastSpokeTo = NULL();
 276  	if (hasObjVar(this, "lastSpokeTo")) {
 277  		lastSpokeTo = getObjVar(this, "lastSpokeTo");
 278  		if (lastSpokeTo == speaker) {
 279  			Q4KB = 0x00;
 280  			if (getDistanceInTiles(getLocation(this), getLocation(speaker)) < 0x06) {
 281  				faceHere(this, getDirectionInternal(getLocation(this), getLocation(speaker)));
 282  			}
 283  		}
 284  	}
 285  	if (!isFacingPerson(speaker, this)) {
 286  		if (lastSpokeTo != NULL()) {
 287  			if (getDistanceInTiles(getLocation(this), getLocation(speaker)) < 0x04) {
 288  				if (lastSpokeTo == speaker) {
 289  					Q4QI = 0x01;
 290  					Q4KB = 0x00;
 291  				}
 292  			}
 293  		}
 294  		if (getDistanceInTiles(getLocation(speaker), getLocation(this)) < 0x02) {
 295  			Q4QI = 0x01;
 296  		}
 297  		if (!matches_target_keywords(this, args)) {
 298  			Q4QI = 0x00;
 299  		}
 300  		if (Q4QI) {
 301  			faceHere(this, getDirectionInternal(getLocation(this), getLocation(speaker)));
 302  			if (Q4KB) {
 303  				replyTo(this, speaker, "@InternalConvinit");
 304  			}
 305  			start_conversation_pause(this);
 306  			setObjVar(this, "lastSpokeTo", speaker);
 307  			return(0x01);
 308  		}
 309  		return(0x00);
 310  	}
 311  	if (!isFacingPerson(this, speaker)) {
 312  		if (0x00) {
 313  			bark(this, "We are not facing each other.");
 314  		}
 315  		string Q618;
 316  		int i;
 317  		Q4QI = 0x00;
 318  		if (isInList(args, getName(this))) {
 319  			Q4QI = 0x01;
 320  			if (0x00) {
 321  				debugMessage("Detected my name in a speech trigger.");
 322  			}
 323  		}
 324  		if (getDistanceInTiles(getLocation(speaker), getLocation(this)) < 0x04) {
 325  			if (matches_target_keywords(this, args)) {
 326  				Q4QI = 0x01;
 327  			}
 328  		}
 329  		if (lastSpokeTo != NULL()) {
 330  			if (lastSpokeTo == speaker) {
 331  				Q4KB = 0x00;
 332  				Q4QI = 0x01;
 333  			}
 334  		}
 335  		if (!Q4QI) {
 336  			return(0x00);
 337  		}
 338  		if (lastSpokeTo != NULL()) {
 339  			if (lastSpokeTo != speaker) {
 340  				if (getDistanceInTiles(getLocation(this), getLocation(lastSpokeTo)) < 0x05) {
 341  					int Q4ID = getDirectionInternal(getLocation(this), getLocation(lastSpokeTo));
 342  					faceHere(this, Q4ID);
 343  					string Q4OD = "Excuse me, " + getName(lastSpokeTo) + ", but " + getName(speaker) + " is calling me.";
 344  					bark(this, Q4OD);
 345  					Q4KB = 0x01;
 346  				}
 347  			}
 348  		}
 349  		if (0x00) {
 350  			debugMessage("Calling the convinit keyword.");
 351  		}
 352  		faceHere(this, Q602);
 353  		if (Q4KB) {
 354  			replyTo(this, speaker, "@InternalConvinit");
 355  		}
 356  		int bow = 0x00;
 357  		if (!getCompileFlag(0x01)) {
 358  			if (getNotoriety(speaker) > 0x5A) {
 359  				bow = 0x01;
 360  			}
 361  		} else {
 362  			if (getFameLevel(speaker) > 0x03) {
 363  				bow = 0x01;
 364  			}
 365  		}
 366  		if (bow) {
 367  			if (getSex(this) == 0x00) {
 368  				face_and_cast_action(this, Q602);
 369  			} else {
 370  				face_and_animate_action(this, Q602);
 371  			}
 372  		}
 373  		setObjVar(this, "lastSpokeTo", speaker);
 374  		start_conversation_pause(this);
 375  	}
 376  	int Q68W = 0x01;
 377  	if (hasObjVar(this, "myJobLocation")) {
 378  		loc myJobLocation = getObjVar(this, "myJobLocation");
 379  		if (getDistanceInTiles(getLocation(this), myJobLocation) > 0x10) {
 380  			Q68W = 0x00;
 381  		}
 382  	}
 383  	if (isGuard(this)) {
 384  		Q68W = 0x00;
 385  	}
 386  	Q68W = 0x00;
 387  	if (isInList(args, "come")) {
 388  		if (Q68W) {
 389  			walkTo(this, getLocation(speaker), 0x05);
 390  			callback(this, 0x2D, 0x0C);
 391  		}
 392  	} else {
 393  		if (getDistanceInTiles(Q4VS, there) > 0x03) {
 394  			if (Q68W) {
 395  				walkTo(this, interpose(Q4VS, there), 0x05);
 396  				if (0x00) {
 397  					debugMessage("Walking closer to speaker.");
 398  				}
 399  			}
 400  		}
 401  	}
 402  	return(0x01);
 403  }

  56  function string Q4JM(obj user, obj usedon) {
  57  	string name;
  58  	name = get_magic_item_name(usedon);
  59  	if (name == "") {
  60  		doLookAt(user, usedon);
  61  		return(name);
  62  	} else {
  63  		if (hasObjVar(usedon, "charges")) {
  64  			int charges = getObjVar(usedon, "charges");

  76  		removeObjVar(usedon, "appraising");
  77  	}
  78  	return(name);
  79  }

  51  function void Q5J8(int north, int east, int south, int west) {
  52  	loc Q5C0 = getLocation(this);
  53  	loc Q5FZ;
  54  	if (hasObjVar(this, "LOCATION")) {
  55  		Q5FZ = getObjVar(this, "LOCATION");
  56  	} else {
  57  		Q5FZ = Q5C0;
  58  	}
  59  	int Q5G3 = getX(Q5FZ);
  60  	int Q5G4 = getY(Q5FZ);
  61  	int Q5CE = getX(Q5C0);
  62  	int Q5CF = getY(Q5C0);
  63  	int Q4HC = Q5G3 - Q5CE;
  64  	int Q4HD = Q5G4 - Q5CF;
  65  	int Q44V;
  66  	int Q44W;
  67  	int Q5BG = 0x00 - 0x01;
  68  	if (Q4HC < 0x00) {
  69  		Q44V = Q4HC * Q5BG;
  70  	} else {
  71  		Q44V = Q4HC;
  72  	}
  73  	if (Q4HD < 0x00) {
  74  		Q44W = Q4HD * Q5BG;
  75  	} else {
  76  		Q44W = Q4HD;
  77  	}
  78  	if (Q44V == Q44W) {
  79  		if ((Q44V == 0x00) && (Q44W == 0x00)) {
  80  			return();
  81  		}
  82  		int Q5L6 = random(0x00, 0x01);
  83  		if (Q5L6) {
  84  			if (Q4HC > 0x00) {
  85  				change_object_type_and_script(this, west);
  86  			} else {
  87  				change_object_type_and_script(this, east);
  88  			}
  89  		} else {
  90  			if (Q4HD > 0x00) {
  91  				change_object_type_and_script(this, north);
  92  			} else {
  93  				change_object_type_and_script(this, south);
  94  			}
  95  		}
  96  	} else {
  97  		if (Q44V > Q44W) {
  98  			if (Q4HC > 0x00) {
  99  				change_object_type_and_script(this, west);
 100  			} else {
 101  				change_object_type_and_script(this, east);
 102  			}
 103  		} else {
 104  			if (Q4HD > 0x00) {
 105  				change_object_type_and_script(this, north);
 106  			} else {
 107  				change_object_type_and_script(this, south);
 108  			}
 109  		}
 110  	}
 111  	loc location = getLocation(this);
 112  	setObjVar(this, "LOCATION", location);
 113  	return();
 114  }

  49  		return(0x01);

  60  	}

  63  	return(0x01);
  64  }

   3  function int Q4KO(obj user, obj usedon) {
   4  	int Q5NC = 0x00;
   5  	if (is_valid_object(usedon)) {
   6  		loc Q4VS = getLocation(user);
   7  		loc there = getLocation(usedon);
   8  		faceHere(user, getDirectionInternal(Q4VS, there));
   9  		int item = getObjType(usedon);
  10  		loc Q61G = there;
  11  		loc Q61H = there;
  12  		loc Q61I = there;
  13  		loc Q61J = there;
  14  		setX(Q61G, getX(there) + 0x01);
  15  		setY(Q61H, getY(there) - 0x01);
  16  		setX(Q61I, getX(there) - 0x01);
  17  		setY(Q61J, getY(there) + 0x01);
  18  		beginSequence();
  19  		doLocAnimation(Q61G, 0x376A, 0x09, 0x0A, 0x00, 0x00);
  20  		doLocAnimation(Q61H, 0x376A, 0x09, 0x0A, 0x00, 0x00);
  21  		doLocAnimation(Q61I, 0x376A, 0x09, 0x0A, 0x00, 0x00);
  22  		doLocAnimation(Q61J, 0x376A, 0x09, 0x0A, 0x00, 0x00);
  23  		endSequence(0x01);
  24  		sfx(there, 0x01EF, 0x00);
  25  		int power = getSkillLevel(user, 0x19) + 0x01;
  26  		if (0x0675 <= item) {
  27  			if (item <= 0x06F4) {
  28  				setObjVar(usedon, "magictrappower", power);
  29  				attachScript(usedon, "mgtp_use");
  30  				Q5NC = 0x01;
  31  			}
  32  		} else {
  33  			if (0x0E3F < item) {
  34  				if (item <= 0x0E43) {
  35  					setObjVar(usedon, "magictrappower", power);
  36  					attachScript(usedon, "mgtp_use");
  37  					Q5NC = 0x01;
  38  				}
  39  			}
  40  		}
  41  		report_crime_at_location(user, getLocation(usedon), 0x02, 0x00);
  42  	}

  44  		barkToHued(user, user, 0x22, "Hmmm...I can't trap that.");
  45  	}
  46  	trigger_mana_drain(this);
  47  	return(Q5NC);
  48  }

  94  function int Q4KD() {
  95  	list nearby_objects;
  96  	int success = 0x00;
  97  	int Q61T;
  98  	Q5HH = 0x0470, 0x08B6, 0x14;
  99  	Q5HI = 0x046D, 0x08B9, 0x14;
 100  	Q5HJ = 0x046A, 0x08B6, 0x14;
 101  	Q5HK = 0x046D, 0x08B3, 0x14;
 102  	getObjectsAt(nearby_objects, Q5HH);
 103  	for (int i = 0x00; i < numInList(nearby_objects); i++) {
 104  		Q61T = getObjType(nearby_objects[i]);
 105  		if (Q61T == 0x0F0E) {
 106  			obj Q45Q = nearby_objects[i];
 107  			success++;
 108  		}
 109  	}
 110  	clearList(nearby_objects);
 111  	getObjectsAt(nearby_objects, Q5HI);
 112  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(nearby_objects); i++) {
 113  		Q61T = getObjType(nearby_objects[i]);
 114  		if (Q61T == 0x1F2B) {
 115  			obj fire = nearby_objects[i];
 116  			success++;
 117  		}
 118  	}
 119  	getObjectsAt(nearby_objects, Q5HJ);
 120  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(nearby_objects); i++) {
 121  		Q61T = getObjType(nearby_objects[i]);
 122  		if (Q61T == 0x19B8) {
 123  			obj Q4NE = nearby_objects[i];
 124  			success++;
 125  		}
 126  	}
 127  	clearList(nearby_objects);
 128  	getObjectsAt(nearby_objects, Q5HK);
 129  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(nearby_objects); i++) {
 130  		Q61T = getObjType(nearby_objects[i]);
 131  		if (Q61T == 0x0FFA) {
 132  			obj water = nearby_objects[i];
 133  			success++;
 134  		}
 135  	}
 136  	if (success >= 0x04) {
 137  		deleteObject(Q45Q);
 138  		Q4WE = createGlobalObjectAt(0x1ECD, Q5HH);
 139  		deleteObject(fire);
 140  		Q4WF = createGlobalObjectAt(0x1ECD, Q5HI);
 141  		deleteObject(Q4NE);
 142  		Q4WG = createGlobalObjectAt(0x1ECD, Q5HJ);
 143  		deleteObject(water);
 144  		Q4WH = createGlobalObjectAt(0x1ECD, Q5HK);
 145  		return(0x01);
 146  	}
 147  	return(0x00);
 148  }

  37  function void Q45W(obj Q4GA) {

  50  	}
  51  	return();

  87  function string Q4TG(int Q4NJ) {
  88  	string name = "Britain";
  89  	switch(city_index) {
  90  	case 0x00
  91  		name = "Britain";
  92  		break;
  93  	case 0x01
  94  		name = "Buccaneer's Den";
  95  		break;
  96  	case 0x02
  97  		name = "Jhelom";
  98  		break;
  99  	case 0x03
 100  		name = "Magincia";
 101  		break;
 102  	case 0x04
 103  		name = "Minoc";
 104  		break;
 105  	case 0x05
 106  		name = "Moonglow";
 107  		break;
 108  	case 0x06
 109  		name = "Ocllo";
 110  		break;
 111  	case 0x07
 112  		name = "Serpent's Hold";
 113  		break;
 114  	case 0x08
 115  		name = "Skara Brae";
 116  		break;
 117  	case 0x09
 118  		name = "Trinsic";
 119  		break;
 120  	case 0x0A
 121  		name = "Vesper";

   3  function int Q4KP(obj user, obj usedon) {
   4  	int Q5NC = 0x00;
   5  	if (is_valid_object(usedon)) {
   6  		loc Q4VS = getLocation(user);
   7  		loc there = getLocation(usedon);
   8  		faceHere(user, getDirectionInternal(Q4VS, there));
   9  		doLocAnimation(getLocation(usedon), 0x376A, 0x09, 0x20, 0x00, 0x00);

  11  		if (hasObjVar(usedon, "isTrapped")) {
  12  			Q5NC = 0x01;
  13  			setObjVar(usedon, "disarmed", 0x01);
  14  		} else {
  15  			if (hasScript(usedon, "mgtp_use")) {
  16  				detachScript(usedon, "mgtp_use");

  18  			} else {
  19  				barkToHued(user, user, 0x22, "That isn't trapped.");
  20  			}
  21  		}
  22  	}
  23  	trigger_mana_drain(this);
  24  	return(Q5NC);
  25  }

 171  function void Q58J(obj me, obj Q68S, string Q68D) {
 172  	string Q5XK;
 173  	obj multi = getMultiSlaveId(me);
 174  	int Q4H3 = getDecayMax(multi);
 175  	if (Q4H3 == 0xFFFF) {
 176  		Q5XK = " is ageless.";
 177  	} else {
 178  		int decay_count = getDecayCount(multi);
 179  		if (decay_count == 0x00) {
 180  			Q5XK = " is like new.";
 181  		} else {
 182  			if (decay_count < (Q4H3 / 0x04)) {
 183  				Q5XK = " is slightly worn.";
 184  			} else {
 185  				if (decay_count < (0x02 * Q4H3 / 0x04)) {
 186  					Q5XK = " is somewhat worn.";
 187  				} else {
 188  					if (decay_count < (0x03 * Q4H3 / 0x04)) {
 189  						Q5XK = " is fairly worn.";
 190  					} else {
 191  						if (decay_count < (0x13 * Q4H3 / 0x14)) {
 192  							Q5XK = " is greatly worn.";
 193  						} else {
 194  							Q5XK = " is in danger of collapsing.";
 195  						}
 196  					}
 197  				}
 198  			}
 199  		}
 200  	}
 201  	string Q5CQ = "This ";
 202  	concat(Q5CQ, item_obj);
 203  	concat(Q5CQ, Q5XK);
 204  	barkTo(me, target_player, Q5CQ);
 205  	return();
 206  }

 220  	return(0x01);

1132  function int Q5VF(obj this, obj speaker, string arg) {
1133  	list args;
1134  	split(args, arg);
1135  	int Q4QI = 0x00;
1136  	int Q4Q1;
1137  	string bar;
1138  	list Q4BC;
1139  	list Q5Z4;
1140  	string Q4QS;
1141  	if (getResourcesOnObj(this, 0x00, Q5Z4)) {
1142  		copyList(Q4BC, Q5Z4);
1143  	}
1144  	if (getResourcesOnObj(this, 0x02, Q5Z4)) {
1145  		for (int i = 0x00; i < (numInList(Q5Z4) - 0x01); i++) {
1146  			bar = Q5Z4[i];
1147  			appendToList(Q4BC, bar);
1148  		}
1149  	}
1150  	string Q47Y;
1151  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q4BC); i++) {
1152  		for (int Q518 = 0x00; Q518 < numInList(args); Q518++) {
1153  			bar = Q4BC[i];
1154  			Q47Y = args[Q518];
1155  			if (bar == Q47Y) {
1156  				Q4QI = 0x01;
1157  				Q4QS = Q4BC[i];
1158  			}
1159  		}
1160  	}
1161  	if (Q4QI) {
1162  		if (0x00) {
1163  			bark(this, "Found something!");
1164  			bark(this, Q4QS);
1165  		}
1166  		bar = Q4QS;
1167  		if (getResource(Q4Q1, this, Q4QS, 0x00, 0x02)) {
1168  			bar = getResourceName(Q4QS, 0x00);
1169  		} else {
1170  			if (getResource(Q4Q1, this, Q4QS, 0x02, 0x02)) {
1171  				bar = getResourceName(Q4QS, 0x02);
1172  			}
1173  		}
1174  		setObjVar(this, "CurrentNeedString", bar);
1175  		replyTo(this, speaker, "@InternalNeedResponse");
1176  		start_conversation_pause(this);
1177  		return(0x00);
1178  	}
1179  	return(0x01);
1180  }

1182  function int Q4C4(obj this, obj speaker, string arg) {
1183  	list args;
1184  	split(args, arg);
1185  	if (isInList(args, "time")) {
1186  		string Q613;
1187  		int Q60B;
1188  		string Q4WP;
1189  		int Q60I;
1190  		string Q57B;
1191  		int Q45A = 0x00;
1192  		Q60I = getMinute();
1193  		Q60B = getHour();
1194  		Q60I = Q60I / 0x05;
1195  		switch(Q60I) {
1196  		case 0x00
1197  			Q57B = "";
1198  			Q45A = 0x01;
1199  			break;
1200  		case 0x01
1201  			Q57B = "a few minutes past";
1202  			break;
1203  		case 0x02
1204  			Q57B = "ten past";
1205  			break;
1206  		case 0x03
1207  			Q57B = "quarter past";
1208  			break;
1209  		case 0x04
1210  			Q57B = "twenty minutes past";
1211  			break;
1212  		case 0x05
1213  			Q57B = "a few minutes shy of half-past";

1880  function int Q4M7(obj this, obj speaker, string arg) {
1881  	if (!isShopkeeper(this)) {
1882  		return(0x01);
1883  	}

1916  		loc myJobLocation = getObjVar(this, "myJobLocation");

1918  			string myHomeShop = getObjVar(this, "myHomeShop");

1921  			split(Q5GR, myHomeShop);

1932  				if (0x00) {

1938  			}
1939  		}
1940  		if (!Q4QI) {
1941  			bark(this, "I am sorry, I do not have my wares here with me. Mayhap if thou didst catch me in my shop.");
1942  			start_conversation_pause(this);
1943  			return(0x00);
1944  		}
1945  	} else {
1946  		bark(this, "Alas, I have no shop! I cannot do business with thee.");
1947  		start_conversation_pause(this);
1948  		return(0x00);
1949  	}

1951  	int Q5SW = 0xFE;

1954  	}

1956  		guildMember = getObjVar(speaker, "guildMember");
1957  	}
1958  	if (Q5SW == guildMember) {
1959  		bark(this, "As thou'rt of my same guild, I shall discount my wares to thee.");
1960  		start_conversation_pause(this);
1961  	}
1962  	shopKeeperOpenBusiness(this, speaker);
1963  	setObjVar(this, "wasAskedBuy", 0x01);
1964  	start_conversation_pause(this);
1965  	return(0x01);
1966  }

1994  function int Q4CE(string Q46R) {
1995  	int i;
1996  	list Q59E;
1997  	int Q4QM = 0x00;
1998  	if (!hasObjVar(this, "myMurderWitnessList")) {
1999  		debugMessage("No murder list.");
2000  		return(0x00);
2001  	}
2002  	getObjListVar(Q59E, this, "myMurderWitnessList");
2003  	list Q61X;
2004  	string Q5ZM;
2005  	for (i = 0x00; i < numInList(Q59E); i++) {
2006  		copyList(Q61X, Q59E[i]);
2007  		if (Q46R == getName(Q61X[0x00])) {
2008  			Q5ZM = getName(Q61X[0x00]) + " is a bloody murderer! I saw " + getHimHer(Q61X[0x00]) + " kill " + getName(Q61X[0x01]) + " with my own eyes!";
2009  			Q4QM = 0x01;
2010  			break;
2011  		}
2012  		if (Q46R == getName(Q61X[0x01])) {
2013  			Q5ZM = getName(Q61X[0x01]) + " was brutally slain by " + getName(Q61X[0x00]) + "!" + " I saw it with my own eyes!";
2014  			Q4QM = 0x01;
2015  			break;
2016  		}
2017  	}
2018  	if (Q4QM) {
2019  		start_conversation_pause(this);
2020  		obj Q611 = Q61X[0x00];
2021  		string Q58D = getHeShe(Q611) + " is " + getDirection(getLocation(this), getLocation(Q611)) + ".";
2022  		bark(this, Q58D);
2023  		if (getDirection(getLocation(this), getLocation(Q611)) != "right here") {
2024  			Q58D = "It is " + getDistance(getLocation(this), getLocation(Q611)) + " from here.";
2025  			if (getDistance(getLocation(this), getLocation(Q611)) == "right here") {
2026  				Q58D = "Just turn around and look.";
2027  			}
2028  			bark(this, Q58D);
2029  			return(0x01);
2030  		}
2031  	}
2032  	return(0x00);
2033  }

 168  function int Q4V2(obj speaker) {
 169  	if (speaker != Q5YH) {
 170  		return(0x01);
 171  	}
 172  	if ((getNotoriety(speaker) < 0x7F) || has_chaos_sigil(speaker) || has_order_sigil(speaker)) {
 173  		Q5YH = NULL();
 174  		return(0x00);
 175  	}
 176  	obj Q5RU;
 177  	if (Q4YU) {
 178  		Q5RU = requestCreateObjectIn(0x1BC3, getBackpack(speaker));
 179  	} else {
 180  		Q5RU = requestCreateObjectIn(0x1BC4, getBackpack(speaker));
 181  	}
 182  	if (Q5RU == NULL()) {
 183  		bark(this, "I'm sorry, the ranks of the knights are currently full.");
 184  		return(0x00);
 185  	}
 186  	setObjVar(Q5RU, "owner", speaker);
 187  	list Q5H7 = "Excellent! Welcome to our ranks!", "Welcome to our ranks!", "Excellent!", "'Tis a good choice.", "Congratulations!", "I congratulate thee!";
 188  	string Q58D = Q5H7[random(0x00, numInList(Q5H7) - 0x01)];
 189  	Q58D = Q58D + " Thy shield is in thy backpack. Be sure that thou dost not lose thy reputation, or else thou shalt lose thy life with it.";
 190  	bark(this, Q58D);
 191  	Q5YH = NULL();
 192  	return(0x00);
 193  }

 181  function string Q4CI(obj this, list args) {

 197  		name = Q5B5[i];

 213  	}
 214  	return(Q58D);
 215  }

 332  function void Q4MC(obj this, obj giver, int Q4TZ) {
 333  	list Q5N5 = "I shall tell all of thy deed.", "Thy reputation shall be cemented by what I shall tell!", "I thank thee kindly!", "I cannot tell thee how much this helps me!", "I thank thee indeed!", "I confess I never expected thee to aid me!", "I admit that I never expected thee to help me!", "Thou'rt amazing! I thank thee.", "My gratitude hath no bounds!", "I shall tell all my friends of thee!", "My thanks.", "I owe thee many thanks.", "Thou hast accomplished what I sought!", "From the bottom of my heart, I thank thee.";
 334  	string Q58D = Q5N5[random(0x00, numInList(Q5N5) - 0x01)];
 335  	Q58D = Q58D + " ";
 336  	if (Q4TZ) {
 337  		addNotoriety(giver, 0x01);
 338  	} else {
 339  		removeNotoriety(giver, 0x01);
 340  	}
 341  	obj reward = getObjVar(this, "questReward");
 342  	if (reward == NULL()) {
 343  		Q58D = Q58D + "I have no item to give thee, only news... " + generate_rumor_message(this, giver);
 344  	} else {
 345  		if (!hasObj(this, reward)) {
 346  			Q58D = Q58D + " Alas, the reward I was to give thee has been lost! + But... " + generate_rumor_message(this, giver);
 347  		} else {
 348  			if (giveItem(giver, reward) == NULL()) {
 349  				int Q4TR = teleport(reward, getLocation(giver));
 350  			}
 351  			Q58D = Q58D + " Please accept this " + getName(reward) + " as a reward.";
 352  		}
 353  	}
 354  	bark(this, Q58D);
 355  	disable_npc_and_schedule_death(this);
 356  	return();
 357  }

  32  trigger washit {
  33  	int Q4IB = (Q42S(Q5UY) - 0x01) * 0x03E8 / 0x07;
  34  	Q4IB = Q4IB + damamt * 0x14;
  35  	int Q5NC = getSkillSuccessChance(this, 0x19, Q4IB, 0x28) - random(0x00, 0x03E7);
  36  	if (Q5NC <= 0x00) {
  37  		systemMessage(this, "Your concentration is disturbed, thus ruining thy spell.");
  38  		end_casting_sequence(this);
  39  		return(0x01);
  40  	}
  41  	return(0x01);
  42  }

  16  function loc Q4TC(obj user, loc place) {

  18  	if (!isInMap(place)) {
  19  		return(Q4OT);
  20  	}

  26  	if (!Q4OU && (getEncumbrance(user) > 0x64)) {
  27  		systemMessage(user, "Thou art too encumbered to move.");

  29  	}
  30  	if (!Q4OU && (canSeeLoc(user, place) != 0x01)) {
  31  		systemMessage(user, "Target cannot be seen.");

  34  	if (!Q4OU) {

 152  function void Q4DP(obj user) {
 153  	int Q4TX = (getCanCarry(user) - getWeight(user)) * 0x32;
 154  	if (Q4TX <= 0x00) {
 155  		barkTo(this, user, "You are overloaded already.");
 156  		return();
 157  	}
 158  	obj gold = withdraw_gold_for_user(user, user, Q4TX);
 159  	if (gold == NULL()) {
 160  		barkTo(this, user, "I am holding no gold for you.");
 161  		return();
 162  	}
 163  	int quantity = getQuantity(gold);
 164  	if (quantity >= Q4TX) {
 165  		barkTo(this, user, "Here is " + quantity + " gold, all you can carry.");
 166  	} else {
 167  		barkTo(this, user, "Here is " + quantity + " gold, all I've collected.");
 168  	}
 169  	return();
 170  }
